title: Interaction Designer (UX Designer)
body:
User experience must be satisfactory, users must easily find what they want and be offered optimal readability, and all of this must be considered from the beginning [web design](http://www.xarop.com/blog/general/) and throughout the entire development process.

This is why interface design is one of the fundamental tasks of any web designer, who could also be called an Interaction Designer (User Experience Designer)

**Who doesn't love good design?**

http://vimeo.com/19131028
